_comment: CANONICAL DATA FILE — edit this file to update BOTH the 3D and standard resume pages simultaneously. Both pages auto-fetch this on startup; localStorage data is a fallback if this file is absent.

profile.name: Isaac E. Norris
profile.headline: Designer • Full-spectrum systemic perspective • Artisan craft transmuted through futuristic technology
profile.summary: Mechanically inclined, artistically driven designer-engineer building interactive systems that turn technology into spaces of connection.

hero.primary_domains: Design Systems • Electrical Engineering • Mechanical Engineering • Embedded Systems • Artisanal Fabrication
hero.focus: Full-spectrum growth • Concept evolution • Artisan direction • Systems zoom-out + detail zoom-in
hero.style: Organic • Biomimicry • Futuristic • Adaptive • Multi-language design

mvv.mission: Design and build human-centered interactive systems that blend artisanship, engineering, and community care to create shared moments of connection.
mvv.vision: Unify people through interactive technology, lighting, and physical products that invite participation, wonder, and belonging rather than division.

jobs.title: Head of 3D Print Lab — Mojo Coworking
details: Operated, repaired, and managed 3D printers for a public-facing lab.
Taught weekly community classes on 3D printing and design workflows.
Delivered prints and supported members' projects end-to-end.

jobs.title: Metal Fabricator — Linamar NC
details: Assisted maintenance fabrication projects to improve assembly line efficiency.
Welding, machining, and CAD-supported production improvements.

jobs.title: Machinist & Assembler — MicroTech Knives
details: Sandblasted and prepared knives for electroplating and finishing.

jobs.title: Electrical & Mechanical Engineer — Dimension 3 Fabrication
details: Designed a multi-function machine combining 3D printing, CNC engraving, and laser engraving.
Owned 3D modeling, electrical design, software development, and manufacturing integration.

jobs.title: Lead Engineer & Design Manager — Gorilla Machines Inc
details: Designed and manufactured CNC plasma cutting machines end-to-end.
Led redesign and manufacturing improvements for flagship platform.

jobs.title: Owner / Electrical & Mechanical Engineer / Lighting Designer — Space Cadets Lighting
details: Designs and manufactures sound-reactive, Wi-Fi connected, full-color LED fixtures and installations.
Handles product development across electronics, firmware, CAD, additive manufacturing, assembly, and testing.

education.title: Dedicated Self-Guided Education
details: Primary education pillar: continuous self-guided learning across electrical/mechanical engineering, embedded systems, product design, manufacturing, and business operations.

education.title: Asheville-Buncombe Technical Community College (AB Tech)
details: Completed one semester toward Electrical Engineering.
Left formal coursework to build CNC and robotics systems after already surpassing covered material.

education.title: Asheville High School (CTE Honors)
details: Early fabrication mentorship and hands-on engineering foundation.

passions: Interactive light + sound experiences that move people emotionally
Embedded systems and modular hardware ecosystems
Product design blending sculpture, nature-inspired form, and engineering
Robotics / motion systems and multidisciplinary machines

timeline.title: Head of 3D Print Lab — Mojo Coworking
timeline.details: Ran the Mojo 3D Print Lab: operations, repair, management, and community education. Taught weekly public classes on 3D printing and design workflows.

timeline.title: Metal Fabricator — Linamar NC
timeline.details: Maintenance fabrication and assembly-line efficiency improvements using welding, machining, and CAD-supported production.

timeline.title: Machinist & Assembler — MicroTech Knives
timeline.details: Thermoforming, sandblasting, and precision finishing for premium knife production.

timeline.title: Electrical & Mechanical Engineer — Dimension 3 Fabrication
timeline.details: Designed a multi-function machine combining 3D printing, CNC engraving, and laser engraving from concept through production.

timeline.title: Lead Engineer & Design Manager — Gorilla Machines Inc
timeline.details: Designed and manufactured CNC plasma cutting machines end-to-end (~100–150 units deployed). Led flagship platform redesign and manufacturing improvements.

timeline.title: Space Cadets Lighting — Founder
timeline.details: Founded Space Cadets Lighting: interactive LED products and installations. Full-stack hardware ownership — electronics, firmware, CAD, additive manufacturing, assembly, and testing.

skills_markdown:
# Isaac Norris — Comprehensive Master Skill & Capability Map

## Core Engineering Domains

### Mechanical Engineering & Product Design

#### CAD & Digital Design
- 13+ years CAD experience (Autodesk Inventor + Fusion 360)
- Complex mechanical assemblies
- Motion systems & linear rail architecture
- Structural framing & load-aware design
- Lightweight optimization strategies
- Sheet metal design
- CNC-manufacturable part design
- Additive-manufacturing-optimized geometry
- Product enclosure architecture
- Organic / biomimetic structural modeling
- CAM workflow familiarity

#### Machine Design & Mechatronics
- CNC plasma cutting machine design & redesign
- Multi-function fabrication systems (3D print + CNC + laser)
- Gantry systems & mechanical motion design
- Mechanical-electrical integration
- Manufacturable architecture planning
- Real-world tolerance & assembly awareness

#### Manual & CNC Machining
- CNC mills, plasma cutters, lathes, laser cutters
- Manual milling & turning
- Mechanical assembly construction
- Fabrication process optimization

#### Woodworking & Structural Construction
- Cabinetry & furniture
- Speaker enclosures
- Structural object construction
- Practical field installation builds

### Additive Manufacturing (Advanced Specialization)
- Advanced 3D printer tuning & diagnostics
- Custom printer building & modification
- Large-format printer understanding
- Production repeatability optimization
- Structural print optimization
- Surface finish & aesthetic refinement strategies
- Slicer parameter optimization
- Failure mode diagnosis & repair
- Print-for-manufacture design thinking

### Electrical Engineering & Circuit Design

#### Circuit Design & PCB Architecture
- Schematic capture
- Production PCB layout
- Circuit design in EasyEDA (primary tool)
- Exposure to Altium Designer (limited)
- Exposure to KiCad (limited)
- Motor driver systems
- LED driver systems
- Modular electronics ecosystems
- Power regulation systems
- Prototype → production transition strategy
- Connector & harness planning
- High-current system planning

#### Electrical Prototyping
- Concept-to-hardware implementation
- Integrated electronics prototyping (core pillar)
- Robotics & RC aircraft systems
- CNC control electronics
- Embedded controller boards
- Distributed electronics integration

#### Power Systems
- Solar + battery backup installations
- Power distribution architecture
- Real-world wiring reliability
- Fuse & safety planning
- Installation-grade power management

### Embedded Systems & Firmware

#### Programming Ecosystems
- Embedded C++
- Arduino ecosystem
- ESP32 / ESP8266 platforms
- Atmel microcontrollers

#### Control Systems
- Motor control firmware
- ESC tuning concepts
- Real-time control loops
- Multi-microcontroller coordination
- Sensor integration
- Distributed embedded architecture

#### Wireless & Networking
- WiFi-connected hardware systems
- Wireless LED mesh systems
- Network topology reasoning (embedded context)
- OTA & modular ecosystem thinking

#### User Interface Exposure
- CAM interface software development
- Embedded system interface design reasoning
- Hardware-facing UI thinking

## Motion & Propulsion System Experience

### Flight & Drone Systems (Technical Origin)
- Quadcopter frame design
- 3D printed drone components
- ArduPilot & Pixhawk integration
- ESC tuning
- Autonomous flight system setup
- Motor control integration
- Real-time control logic understanding

### CNC & Motor Systems
- Stepper motor drivers
- Motion control board design
- CNC motion architecture
- Gantry performance tuning
- Control electronics integration
- Production-scale machine deployment (~100–150 units)

### Electromechanical System Architecture
- Mechanical + electrical + firmware integration
- System-level motion reasoning
- Hardware reliability planning
- Platform-level modular thinking

## Interactive & Lighting Systems Engineering

### LED Architecture
- Addressable LED ecosystems
- Modular lighting platforms
- Wearable electronics
- Sculptural integration
- Installation-scale deployments

### Control & Interaction
- Sound-reactive lighting systems
- WiFi controller ecosystems
- Capacitive touch interfaces
- Multi-node synchronization
- Distributed control systems

### Platform Vision
- LightDrive ecosystem architecture
- Modular hardware systems
- Upgradeable design philosophy
- Licensing-ready hardware concepts

## Systems Engineering & Architecture
- Cross-domain integration (mechanical + electrical + firmware)
- Modular platform architecture design
- Manufacturing-aware engineering
- Field reliability systems
- Maintainability planning
- Real-world deployment logistics
- Production scaling awareness
- Iterative product evolution cycles
- Founder-level system ownership

## Creative & Artistic Capabilities

### Material & Craft Literacy
- Glassblowing exposure
- Ceramics & pottery wheel operation
- Sculptural fabrication
- Multi-medium art fluency

### Aesthetic Integration
- Organic geometry design
- Emotion-driven lighting systems
- Art-technology fusion
- Nature-inspired structural thinking

### Audio & Form Exploration
- Speaker resonance design
- Nautilus-inspired acoustic forms
- Sound system wiring experience

## Communication, Leadership & Education

### Teaching & Mentorship
- Head of 3D Print Lab
- Community education programs
- Weekly technical classes
- Technical knowledge translation

### Team Leadership
- Lead Engineer & Design Manager roles
- Manufacturing oversight
- Engineering redesign leadership
- Co-running operations in startup environment

### Technical Communication
- Explaining complex engineering concepts clearly
- Documentation & instructional materials
- Cross-disciplinary translation (engineering ↔ creative)

## Business, Brand & Operations

### Entrepreneurial Experience
- Founded hardware startups
- Attempted 3D printer company launch
- Built Space Cadets Lighting ecosystem
- Product + brand integration
- Small-scale production management

### Marketing & Digital Presence
- Website development (WIX + HTML/CSS familiarity)
- User Interface (UI) design
- Web system architecture (single-file apps, embedded systems, responsive layouts)
- Graphic design (Photoshop)
- Instruction manual design
- Targeted web advertising (Facebook & Google Ads)
- Product photography & presentation

### Commercial Fabrication & Installation
- Commercial signage fabrication & permitting
- Metal fabrication
- Field installation logistics

## Broader Technical & Hands-On Skills
- Sublimation printing systems
- UV printing systems (Eufy Make E1 – incoming capability)
- Automotive repair & engine replacement
- Gas-to-electric vehicle conversion
- Suspension, brake, and drivetrain repair
- Computer assembly & optimization
- Hardware selection for performance systems
- Tiny home solar installs

## Strategic Strength Summary
- Designing complete hardware systems from zero
- Integrating mechanical + electrical + firmware layers
- Creating modular, upgradeable architectures
- Leading small hardware teams
- Shipping real-world physical products
- Bridging engineering with aesthetic design
- Translating complexity into clarity
- Building mission-driven, interdisciplinary systems
